title: Lamb Tagine
description: A traditional Moroccan dish made with tender lamb and a variety of spices, cooked in a flavorful tagine.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the bottom of a large clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for another minute.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add 1 cup of water to the tagine and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
